top_findings.summary: The skill description (SKILL.md) and implementation guide request access to exchange API keys and blockchain RPC endpoints, which are excessive for the stated primary purpose. According to the PRD and ARD, the skill's core functionality relies solely on public APIs (DeFiLlama, Token Terminal, Dune, CoinGecko) for aggregated on-chain analytics. Requesting exchange API keys (implying trading or account access) and direct RPC endpoints goes beyond the stated scope of "analyzing blockchain metrics" and introduces unnecessary privacy/security risks. Additionally, the skill requests Write/Edit permissions without clear constraints, which could allow unintended file modifications beyond caching/output generation.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection & Permission Overreach - The skill description (SKILL.md) and implementation guide request access to exchange API keys and blockchain RPC endpoints, which are excessive for the stated primary purpose. According to the PRD and ARD, the skill's core functionality relies solely on public APIs (DeFiLlama, Token Terminal, Dune, CoinGecko) for aggregated on-chain analytics. Requesting exchange API keys (implying trading or account access) and direct RPC endpoints goes beyond the stated scope of "analyzing blockchain metrics" and introduces unnecessary privacy/security risks. Additionally, the skill requests Write/Edit permissions without clear constraints, which could allow unintended file modifications beyond caching/output generation.
